# Repository Metadata

## Suggested description

EVE Online fit analysis tool — evaluate skills, training time, and character readiness.

## Suggested topics

- eve-online
- fitting
- skill-planner
- nextjs
- typescript

## Tagline

DB-backed fit analysis for EVE Online characters.

## Elevator pitch

FitPilotHQ syncs EVE character state, analyzes EFT fits against stored skills and attributes, and helps estimate missing requirements and training time.
